specialty: Seguin Homes, Open Houses & Local Buyer Guidance
headline: Find your next home in Seguin with local guidance you can trust.

cardTitle: Explore open houses across Seguin and nearby communities.
cardText: Find new listings, ask questions, schedule private tours, and get local guidance before making your next move.
feature1Text: See what is available, ask about upcoming open houses, and get help deciding which homes are worth visiting.
feature2Text: Understand Seguin, New Braunfels, Canyon Lake, Guadalupe County, and nearby communities before choosing where to focus.
feature3Text: Have a question about a listing, timeline, or next step? Reach out directly and get a clear answer.
areasHeadline: Helping buyers throughout Seguin and surrounding Texas communities
areasText: Whether you know exactly where you want to live or you are still comparing areas, get local guidance before you tour.
aboutHeadline: A friendly local guide for your next home search.
aboutText: Whether you’re buying your first home or looking for your next move, I’m here to help you compare neighborhoods, tour homes, understand your options, and make confident decisions.
compliance: JLA Realty • Tina Garcia. Brokerage, license information, Equal Housing, and required disclosures would be finalized before launch.
testimonial: “Start with the right local guidance before you tour, make an offer, or choose your next neighborhood.”
leadHeadline: Ready to look at homes around Seguin?
leadText: Share what you’re looking for, your timeline, and the areas you’re considering. I’ll help you understand the best next step.
